TRAILBLAZER : The Extraordinary Journey of Judy Faulkner: The Biography of the Co-founder of Epic Systems; Pioneering the Future of Healthcare Technology ... of America's Richest Self-Made Women) Kindle Edition
Trailblazer: The Extraordinary Journey of Judy Faulkner
In the realm of healthcare technology, where innovation and compassion intersect, there stands a trailblazer whose visionary leadership has reshaped an entire industry. Enter the captivating world of Judy Faulkner, an extraordinary entrepreneur whose relentless pursuit of excellence and unwavering belief in the power of technology has revolutionized healthcare as we know it.
In this gripping biography, embark on an inspiring journey through the life of Judy Faulkner, from her humble beginnings in Cherry Hill, New Jersey, to the creation of Epic Systems, the groundbreaking company that holds the medical records of over 200 million people worldwide. Witness how a young woman's passion for healthcare, instilled by her parents, transformed into an unstoppable force that would challenge the status quo and redefine the boundaries of what was possible.
Through the pages of this book, discover the audacity and determination that led Judy Faulkner to co-found Epic Systems in a modest basement, armed with a vision and a $70,000 investment. Follow her as she navigates the complexities of building a company, steadfastly refusing venture capital or acquisition by other entities, and maintaining her commitment to privacy and data security. Learn how she defied conventional wisdom by staying privately held, ensuring that Epic Systems remains true to its core values and prioritizes the long-term impact over short-term gains.
But this biography is not just about the rise of a formidable entrepreneur. It delves deep into the indomitable spirit of Judy Faulkner, exploring her personal life, her family, and the values that shaped her extraordinary journey. Discover the pivotal role played by her parents in igniting her passion for healthcare and social responsibility. Uncover the bonds of love and support shared with her husband, Dr. Gordon Faulkner, and their three children, as they navigated the challenges and triumphs of building an empire.
As you turn each page, be captivated by the immense philanthropic legacy that Judy Faulkner has crafted. Explore her commitment to giving back and the profound impact she has made through The Giving Pledge, pledging 99% of her assets to philanthropic causes. Witness the transformative power of her generosity as she inspires a new generation of philanthropists to drive positive change and address critical social issues.
In the rapidly evolving world of technology and healthcare, Judy Faulkner stands as a beacon of inspiration. Her story, filled with passion, resilience, and the relentless pursuit of excellence, will leave you in awe and ignite a fire within you. Whether you are a healthcare professional, a technology enthusiast, or simply someone who believes in the power of making a difference, this biography is a must-read, offering a profound glimpse into the life of a visionary leader who has transformed the lives of millions.
Join us on this captivating journey as we uncover the extraordinary life of Judy Faulkner—a trailblazer whose unwavering determination and pioneering spirit have left an indelible mark on the world of healthcare technology and philanthropy.

- Reviewed in the United States on September 6, 2023Format: PaperbackVerified PurchaseWikipedia has a better “biography” of Judy than this book. The dialogue is redundant. No input is from Judy herself. If you really want to know Judy, work for Epic or go visit the company in Wisconsin.
